prose.title: 35t mos
prose.body: The 35T military occupational specialty (MOS) refers to a position in the United States Army's Intelligence branch. The 35T MOS, also known as the Military Intelligence Systems Maintainer/Integrator, is responsible for maintaining and integrating intelligence collection systems. This includes troubleshooting, repairing, and maintaining various equipment used in intelligence gathering, such as radar systems and electronic warfare equipment. Additionally, 35Ts are trained to integrate and operate these systems in order to provide vital intelligence to military commanders.
